isolation.scope: shared dev server/database; read-only guest flows only

assertionResults.observations: Guest loaded home, /football, /basketball, /concert, and a product detail route without any login redirect.

evidence.network: Public pages loaded successfully; product detail resolved at /products/cmn73y3w80007l0khinmfb3ij

assertionResults.observations: Guest could browse pricing, availability, description, badges, and Buyer Protection content before interacting with gated actions.

evidence.network: GET /api/products and GET /api/products/cmn73y3w80007l0khinmfb3ij completed during anonymous browsing

assertionResults.observations: Guest tapping Purchase from the product detail page redirected to /login with callbackUrl preserving the detail route.
Guest tapping For sale from the same detail page redirected to /login with the original detail callbackUrl preserved.
Guest access to /my/orders redirected to login and preserved callbackUrl to the requested /my/** route.
Buyer Protection and trust badges were visible to a guest on browse and detail surfaces before login was required.

evidence.network: Trust content was rendered on anonymous route loads

assertionResults.observations: After guest purchase redirect and login, clicking Purchase did not open a dedicated purchase destination or flow; it stayed on the detail page and showed an inline success modal instead.

evidence.network: Post-login return landed on /products/cmn73y3w80007l0khinmfb3ij; subsequent Purchase action remained on same URL

assertionResults.observations: After guest sell redirect and login, clicking For sale did not open a dedicated listing destination or flow; it remained on the detail page and only displayed an inline success modal.

evidence.network: Post-login return landed on /products/cmn73y3w80007l0khinmfb3ij; subsequent For sale action remained on same URL

assertionResults.observations: Guest directly opened /football, /basketball, and /concert without login redirect, and each route showed browseable event inventory with trust content.

frictions.description: The path /Users/wendy/.factory/library/user-testing.md referenced in mission guidance was missing, so no additional flow-validator guidance could be read.
frictions.resolution: Proceeded using mission AGENTS.md and validation-contract.md only.

frictions.description: Numeric detail URLs /events/1 and /products/1 returned not-found states because the app uses seeded record IDs rather than simple integers.
frictions.resolution: Opened a real detail page by clicking a public product card from the home page and validated the guest/login-gate flows there.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 7 passed and 2 failed. Guest browsing and login gates worked, but the post-login purchase/listing destination assertions failed because both actions stayed on the detail page and surfaced inline success modals instead of entering distinct destination flows.
